🍪 Exhibit sets no tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies. Hosting is provided by Cloudflare Pages, which may log standard request data (IP, user-agent, URL) and set technical cookies to operate its security + performance layer. The Site also loads Google Fonts, Leaflet (cdnjs), and OpenStreetMap basemap tiles — those providers log basic request data under their own policies. A Service Worker caches the app shell on your device for offline use. Full breakdown: Cookie & Cache Notice.

Click any pin on the map to view that school's data — admissions, tuition, bar passage, employment, and BLS market salary.
// Quick filters
● Green pins — first-time bar at least 90%
● Blue pins — first-time bar 75–89%
● Amber pins — first-time bar 60–74%
● Red pins — first-time bar <60%
● Pin size — school enrollment
194 schools shown
Pin ring repeats the tier (solid→dotted) for colorblind clarity. Size = enrollment.
